CustomObject.label: Pulse Workflow Update
CustomObject.description: High-volume Platform Event published when a Workflow_Instance__c, Workflow_Action__c, or Agent_Decision__c undergoes a user-visible state transition. Subscribed to by record-page LWCs (stepper, decision queue, status rail) via lightning/empApi to avoid polling. See docs/proposed-upstream-reactivity-and-ux-patterns.md section 1.
